items.content_html: Query all your data stored in Obsidian, this plugin allows SQL based queries against the data collections available in Obsidian and Dataview. Output can then be rendered by Handlebars

items.content_html: A fully featured replacement for the built-in daily notes plugin. Obligator functions like a virtual bullet journal by copying over unchecked to-do items to your new daily note, along with adding any scheduled items you've set up
